raw_text:
<think>
The user asks: "packet_id=HVSF007X-A38C8CCE5FD3CF680DDF status_values: route_verdict=CONTINUE repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-9EA3AA60 blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it Return the three-line status record."

They want a plain text record with three key=value lines, fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. Must begin with route_verdict=.

They gave input: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-9EA3AA60, blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it.

We just need to return those three lines exactly as requested.

We must ensure no extra lines, headings, etc. Should we preserve the same spacing? They gave the example: "route_verdict=CONTINUE", "repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-9EA3AA60", "blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it". Should we include the packet_id? The user only wants three lines with those fields.

Thus final answer:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-9EA3AA60
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Make sure no extra whitespace at start or end.

Thus final.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-9EA3AA60
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
